_doc: Simple index options strategy. Entry requires enabled conditions to be true. Expiry choice allows only one value at a time: current or next.

entry_conditions._doc: Core entry conditions and extra toggles.

macd_confirmation._doc: Additional indicator 1. For bullish setup, requires MACD line above signal and histogram >= min_histogram.

adx_strength._doc: Additional indicator 2. Requires ADX >= threshold to confirm trend strength.

instrument_selection._doc: Single underlying and single expiry choice at a time.

order_details._doc: One active position at a time. Supports limit/market/sl/sl-m payload fields.

position_management._doc: Manual exit detection by polling broker positions.
